name: rustarr
description: Connects Claude Code to the rustarr MCP server — one tool surface over a media-automation fleet (Sonarr, Radarr, Prowlarr, Tautulli, Overseerr, qBittorrent, SABnzbd, Plex, Jellyfin, and more). Also bundles standalone per-service skills (sonarr, radarr, prowlarr, overseerr, sabnzbd, qbittorrent, plex, jellyfin, tautulli, tracearr, bazarr) that drive each service's REST API directly as an offline fallback when the MCP server is unavailable.

server_url.title: Server URL
server_url.description: Base URL of the MCP HTTP server this Claude Code session connects to. If running locally: keep http://localhost:40070. If connecting to a remote server: set to http://hostname:40070 or https://rustarr.tootie.tv. Do NOT include a trailing /mcp — the plugin appends it automatically.

api_token.title: API token
api_token.description: Bearer token for MCP HTTP authentication. Every request to /mcp includes: Authorization: Bearer <token>. Server mode: pick any value and use the same value in RUSTARR_MCP_TOKEN. Client mode: paste the token your server admin configured. Generate one with: openssl rand -hex 32 or just gen-token.

no_auth.title: Disable service auth
no_auth.description: Run the MCP server without authentication. ONLY safe when the server is bound to 127.x (loopback). Use this for local development only — never expose an unauthed MCP server on a network interface.

auth_mode.title: Auth mode
auth_mode.description: Server auth mode. 'bearer' uses only the static API token. 'oauth' enables Google OAuth/JWT for clients like Codex while the static token remains accepted for this Claude Code plugin connection. OAuth mode requires public_url, google_client_id, google_client_secret, and auth_admin_email.

public_url.title: Public URL
public_url.description: Public base URL for OAuth issuer metadata, e.g. https://rustarr.tootie.tv. Required when auth_mode=oauth. If empty, setup derives it from an https server_url by stripping /mcp suffix. Server mode only.

google_client_id.title: Google OAuth client ID
google_client_id.description: Google OAuth client ID used when auth_mode=oauth. Create a Web application OAuth client in Google Cloud Console (console.cloud.google.com). The plugin setup script adds the required redirect URIs automatically. Server mode only.

google_client_secret.title: Google OAuth client secret
google_client_secret.description: Google OAuth client secret from the same Google Cloud Console credential. Stored in the generated plugin env file with mode 600 (owner-read-only). Server mode only.

auth_admin_email.title: OAuth admin email
auth_admin_email.description: Bootstrap allowed Google account for OAuth mode. The server refuses to start OAuth mode without at least one allowlisted email address. Server mode only.

rustarr_services.title: Configured services
rustarr_services.description: Comma-separated Rustarr service names to configure, for example: sonarr,radarr,prowlarr,overseerr,qbittorrent,plex,jellyfin. Maps to RUSTARR_SERVICES.

sonarr_url.title: Sonarr URL
sonarr_url.description: Sonarr base URL. Maps to RUSTARR_SONARR_URL.

sonarr_api_key.title: Sonarr API key
sonarr_api_key.description: Sonarr API key. Maps to RUSTARR_SONARR_API_KEY.

radarr_url.title: Radarr URL
radarr_url.description: Radarr base URL. Maps to RUSTARR_RADARR_URL.

radarr_api_key.title: Radarr API key
radarr_api_key.description: Radarr API key. Maps to RUSTARR_RADARR_API_KEY.

prowlarr_url.title: Prowlarr URL
prowlarr_url.description: Prowlarr base URL. Maps to RUSTARR_PROWLARR_URL.

prowlarr_api_key.title: Prowlarr API key
prowlarr_api_key.description: Prowlarr API key. Maps to RUSTARR_PROWLARR_API_KEY.

overseerr_url.title: Overseerr URL
overseerr_url.description: Overseerr base URL. Maps to RUSTARR_OVERSEERR_URL.

overseerr_api_key.title: Overseerr API key
overseerr_api_key.description: Overseerr API key. Maps to RUSTARR_OVERSEERR_API_KEY.

jellyfin_url.title: Jellyfin URL
jellyfin_url.description: Jellyfin base URL. Maps to RUSTARR_JELLYFIN_URL.

jellyfin_api_key.title: Jellyfin API key
jellyfin_api_key.description: Jellyfin API key. Maps to RUSTARR_JELLYFIN_API_KEY.

plex_url.title: Plex URL
plex_url.description: Plex Media Server base URL. Maps to RUSTARR_PLEX_URL.

plex_token.title: Plex token
plex_token.description: Plex authentication token (X-Plex-Token). Maps to RUSTARR_PLEX_TOKEN.

qbittorrent_url.title: qBittorrent URL
qbittorrent_url.description: qBittorrent Web UI base URL. Maps to RUSTARR_QBITTORRENT_URL.

qbittorrent_username.title: qBittorrent username
qbittorrent_username.description: qBittorrent Web UI login username. Maps to RUSTARR_QBITTORRENT_USERNAME.

qbittorrent_password.title: qBittorrent password
qbittorrent_password.description: qBittorrent Web UI login password. Maps to RUSTARR_QBITTORRENT_PASSWORD.

sonarr_default_quality_profile.title: Sonarr default quality profile
sonarr_default_quality_profile.description: Quality profile id the bundled sonarr fallback skill uses when adding series.

radarr_default_quality_profile.title: Radarr default quality profile
radarr_default_quality_profile.description: Quality profile id the bundled radarr fallback skill uses when adding movies.

sabnzbd_url.title: SABnzbd URL
sabnzbd_url.description: SABnzbd base URL, e.g. http://localhost:8080. Maps to RUSTARR_SABNZBD_URL / SABNZBD_URL.

tautulli_url.title: Tautulli URL
tautulli_url.description: Tautulli base URL incl. port, e.g. http://localhost:8181. Maps to RUSTARR_TAUTULLI_URL / TAUTULLI_URL.

tracearr_url.title: Tracearr URL
tracearr_url.description: Tracearr base URL for its public API, e.g. http://localhost:3000.

bazarr_url.title: Bazarr URL
bazarr_url.description: Bazarr base URL, e.g. http://localhost:6767. Maps to RUSTARR_BAZARR_URL / BAZARR_URL.
